message:
fix: first Ctrl+C interrupts request, second exits session

Ink's default exitOnCtrlC: true was killing the process on the first
Ctrl+C before our useInput handler could intercept it. Disable ink's
built-in handler so InputArea's two-stage logic works: first Ctrl+C
interrupts the running agent, second Ctrl+C exits the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
